column1: # HARD retrieval: query <TAB> gold_chunk_id
# Zero content-token overlap with gold passage (after simple_tokenize + stop filter).
# Must be disjoint from train_pairs.tsv and from eval/retrieval.tsv (normalized).
# Bag-of-words embedders are expected to score poorly here — this is the honest
# semantic retrieval split (not the lexical-friendly easy set).
What feline housemate rumbles softly when pleased?
Which pet species purrs after a meal beside its owner?
Which pet enjoys fetch games and strolls with its owner?
What loyal companion wags and chases thrown toys?
Which egg-laying creatures often perch high among branches?
Name warm-blooded flyers that sing near dawn.
What owned toolkit finds close vectors without leaving the process?
Which pure Cplusplus package ranks similar items via layered meshes?
What stack executes chat models entirely offline on ordinary hardware?
Which from-scratch engine streams replies from proprietary weight files?
What product stitches lookup to an offline generator for grounded QA?
What app stitches doc search into offline chat for cited answers?
When does plain drinking fluid freeze under everyday weather?
At everyday air density, when does clear dihydrogen monoxide boil?
How long is a calendar year for our home world roughly?
What rocky companion circles the world we live on?
What multilayer topology speeds nearby-item lookup in dense feature spaces?
What structure finds similar points faster by spending extra RAM?
